coalitions: Canada-led Arctic coastal-sovereignty bloc (CAN, DNK, NOR) resisting internationalization of straits
Russia-China economic-strategic partnership on NSR access
Nordic solidarity (FIN, NOR, DNK) blocking any Chinese Arctic Council membership bid
note: With low mediator pressure and a neutral mood, the record ice-free shock created urgency for shipping-safety and environmental cooperation but not enough leverage to force concessions on hard sovereignty red lines, so momentum-holder Canada anchored a framework deal on process while NWP, NSR control, and Chinese navigation rights stayed unresolved.
